description: Cash ISA transfer to Consilium-managed ISA wrapper. Covers transfers from existing cash ISA providers under HMRC ISA regulations. All required evidence must be present and compliant before the transfer instruction is submitted.

evidenceRequirements.description: Current risk profile must be on file and dated within the last 12 months.
Up-to-date fact find confirming client objectives, circumstances, and financial position.
Suitability report specific to this transfer, dated within 90 days of submission.
Valid KYC identity verification. No maximum age — must be valid (document not expired).
Signed fees and charges disclosure (COBS 6.1A) must be on file.

optionalEvidence.description: Notes from the advice meeting at which the ISA transfer was discussed.
Most recent statement from the ceding ISA provider.
